title: dev.kit Experience Capture: Incremental Learning
description: Packages session engineering outcomes into reusable repository skills, knowledge, or agent memory.

inputs.name: target
inputs.description: Target tier: skill, knowledge, or memory.

logic: Package experience into the chosen repository location.
Synchronize the updated experience to the agent environment.

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: A summary of the captured experience and its new location.
